origin.name: Jordan
origin.death_registration: Civil Status Department (Dairat al Ahwal al Madaniya)
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not widely available in Jordan given the predominantly Muslim population. Most repatriations are full body.
origin.key_document: Shihada al wafat (Jordanian death certificate) with certified English translation
origin.source: FCDO Jordan travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Amman guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Shihada al wafat with certified English translation
special_rules: Death certificate (shihada al wafat) is in Arabic. Certified English translation mandatory.
Jordan's civil registration system is efficient by regional standards.
Cremation not widely available. Most repatriations are full body.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Jordanian documentation must be in certified English. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Amman can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Jordan to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Jordan. Repatriation to the UK takes 7-21 days. Arabic documentation and Amman cargo flights all handled. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
key_documents: Shihada al wafat with certified English translation

airlines.name: Royal Jordanian
airlines.routes: AMM to DUB (via LHR or AMS)

special_rules: Irish Embassy in Amman handles consular matters.
Certified English translation of shihada al wafat required identically to UK repatriations.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Jordanian documentation must be in certified English. The Coroner is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. The Irish Embassy in Amman can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Jordan to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Jordan and needs to come home to Ireland. 7-21 days. Arabic documentation and Amman cargo handled. Contact us 24/7.
